title: What Are You Doing?
learningGoal: The learner will actively synthesize sentences in the Present Continuous tense (e.g. 'I am watching'), proving their ability to combine a Subject, an Auxiliary Verb, and a Present Participle.
instructions: Imagine you are talking to your friend on the phone right now. They ask, 'What are you doing?' Write 3 sentences exactly describing what you are doing, what your friend is doing, and what your dog is doing right now. Do not forget the helper verbs (am/is/are) or the 'ing'!

contentItems.text: CRITICAL RULE: DO NOT WRITE 'I eating'. You must write 'I AM eating'.

writingPrompt: Write 3 sentences in the present continuous tense describing actions happening right now involving yourself, your friend, and a dog.
promptGoal: Test strict adherence to the complete gerund formula: Subject + Auxiliary To Be + Root + ING.
referenceHints: Hindi: मैं टीवी देख रहा हूँ। => English: I am watching TV.
Do NOT write: 'I watching TV' or 'I am watch TV'.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: I am studying English right now. My friend is reading a book. The dog is sleeping on the floor.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: आई एम स्टडींग इंग्लिश राइट नाउ। माई फ्रेंड इज़ रीडिंग अ बुक। द डॉग इज़ स्लीपिंग ऑन द फ्लोर।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: मैं अभी अंग्रेजी पढ़ रहा हूँ। मेरा दोस्त एक किताब पढ़ रहा है। कुत्ता फर्श पर सो रहा है।
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect score. The learner successfully deployed the full auxiliary + ing structure for all three subjects without skipping components.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: I eating. My friend is read. The dog sleeping.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: आई ईटिंग। माई फ्रेंड इज़ रीड। द डॉग स्लीपिंग।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: मैं खा रहा हूँ। मेरा दोस्त पढ़ रहा है। कुत्ता सो रहा है।
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Critical failure. Dropped 'am' in the first sentence. Dropped 'ing' in the second. Dropped 'is' in the third. Review required.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user use Am/Is/Are before the action verb?
Did the user append 'ing' to the action verb?
Were there 3 distinct sentences covering the requested subjects?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: I am learning English right now. My friend is talking on the phone. The dog is running in the park.
acceptableAlternates: I am eating an apple. She is going to work. My dog is sleeping.
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Every sentence MUST contain an auxiliary 'To Be' verb preceding an 'ing' present participle.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You flawlessly combined both halves of the Present Continuous. You didn't drop the helper verb, and you didn't drop the 'ing'!
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! A sentence like 'I eating' is broken. It is a car without an engine. You MUST have 'Is, Am, or Are' to make it go: 'I AM eating'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good start! Check your verbs carefully. Make sure every single action word has an 'ing' on the end of it, and a helper verb in front of it.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Write three sentences about what you, your friend, and a dog are doing exactly right now.

hintText: Don't forget the sandwich! Subject + IS/AM/ARE + Action-ING.
